verses.geez: ወተናገሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ለእመ ፡ አበሰት ፡ [በኢያእምሮ ፡] እምውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘኢይከውን ፡ ለገቢር ፡ ወገብረት ፡ አሐተ ፡ እምውስቴቱ ፤

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, If a soul shall sin unwillingly before the Lord, in any of the commandments of the Lord concerning things which he ought not to do, and shall do some of them;
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, If a soul shall sin through ignorance against any of the commandments of the LORD concerning things which ought not to be done, and shall do against any of them:

verses.geez:
ለእመኒ ፡ ሊቀ ፡ ካህናት ፡ ዘቅቡእ ፡ አበሰ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ህየንተ ፡ አበሳሁ ፡ ዘአበሰ ፡ ላህመ ፡
                  ንጹሐ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ።

translations.lxx: if the anointed priest sin so as to cause the people to sin, then shall he bring for his sin, which he has sinned, an unblemished calf of the herd to the Lord for his sin.
translations.kjv: If the priest that is anointed do sin according to the sin of the people; then let him bring for his sin, which he hath sinned, a young bullock without blemish unto the LORD for a sin offering.

verses.geez:
ወያመጽኦ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ላዕለ
                  ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ላህሙ ፡ ወይጠብሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And he shall bring the calf to the door of the tabernacle of witness before the Lord, and he shall put his hand on the head of the calf before the Lord, and shall slay the calf in the presence of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And he shall bring the bullock unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before the LORD; and shall lay his hand upon the bullock’s head, and kill the bullock before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘቅቡእ ፡ ወፍጹም ፡ በእዴሁ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ወያበውኦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ
                  ፡ ዘመርጡል ።

translations.lxx: And the anointed priest who has been consecrated having received of the blood of the calf, shall then bring it into the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And the priest that is anointed shall take of the bullock’s blood, and bring it to the tabernacle of the congregation:

verses.geez:
ወይጠምዕ ፡ ካህን ፡ አጽባዕቶ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደሙ ፡ ወይነዝኅ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደም ፡ ስብዕ ፡ በአጽባዕቱ ፡ ቅድመ
                  ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መንጦላዕተ ፡ ቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall dip his finger into the blood, and sprinkle of the blood seven times before the Lord, over against the holy veil.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall dip his finger in the blood, and sprinkle of the blood seven times before the LORD, before the vail of the sanctuary.

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምነ ፡ ደሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘምዕጣን ፡ ዘይወድዩ ፡ ቅድመ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወይክዑ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ደሞ ፡ ኀበ ፡ መንበሩ ፡ ለምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ፡
                  ዘኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall put of the blood of the calf on the horns of the altar of the compound incense which is before the Lord, which is in the tabernacle of witness; and all the blood of the calf shall he pour out by the foot of the altar of whole-burnt-offerings, which is by the doors of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall put some of the blood upon the horns of the altar of sweet incense before the LORD, which is in the tabernacle of the congregation; and shall pour all the blood of the bullock at the bottom of the altar of the burnt offering, which is at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ያሰስል ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሥብሕ ፡ ዘይገለብቦ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ውስጡ
                  ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ አማዑቱ ፤

translations.lxx: And all the fat of the calf of the sin-offering shall he take off from it; the fat that covers the inwards, and all the fat that is on the inwards,
translations.kjv: And he shall take off from it all the fat of the bullock for the sin offering; the fat that covereth the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,

verses.geez:
ወክልኤሆን ፡ ኵለያቲሁ ፡ ወሥብሐ ፡ ዘላዕሌሆን ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ፀራዒቲሁ ፡ ወከብዶ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵለያቲሁ
                  ፡ ይመትራ ፤

translations.lxx: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, that which is on the thighs, and the caul that is on the liver with the kidneys, them shall he take away,
translations.kjv: And the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, which is by the flanks, and the caul above the liver, with the kidneys, it shall he take away,

verses.geez: በከመ ፡ ያወጽኡ ፡ ዘላህመ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ወይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ።

translations.lxx: as he takes it away from the calf of the sacrifice of peace-offering, so shall the priest offer it on the altar of burnt-offering.
translations.kjv: As it was taken off from the bullock of the sacrifice of peace offerings: and the priest shall burn them upon the altar of the burnt offering.

verses.geez: ወማእሶኒ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ሰኳንዊሁ ፡ ወከርሦ ፡ ወካዕሴሁ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall take the skin of the calf, and all his flesh with the head and the extremities and the belly and the dung,
translations.kjv: And the skin of the bullock, and all his flesh, with his head, and with his legs, and his inwards, and his dung,

verses.geez:
ወይወስድዎ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ላህሞ ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይክዕዉ ፡ ሐመደ ፡ ወያውዕይዎ
                  ፡ በዕፀው ፡ ወበእሳት ፤ ውስተ ፡ ምክዓወ ፡ ሐመድ ፡ ያውዕይዎ ።

translations.lxx: and they shall carry out the whole calf out of the camp into a clean place, where they pour out the ashes, and they shall consume it there on wood with fire: it shall be burnt on the ashes poured out.
translations.kjv: Even the whole bullock shall he carry forth without the camp unto a clean place, where the ashes are poured out, and burn him on the wood with fire: where the ashes are poured out shall he be burnt.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ዘደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ተስሕቶሙ ፡ ወተረስዐት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አዕይንቲሆሙ ፡ ቃል ፡
                  ለተዓይን ፡ ወገብሩ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትእዛዙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘኢይከውን ፡ ለገቢር ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ነስሑ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the whole congregation of Israel trespass ignorantly, and a thing should escape the notice of the congregation, and they should do one thing forbidden of any of the commands of the Lord, which ought not to be done, and should transgress:
translations.kjv: And if the whole congregation of Israel sin through ignorance, and the thing be hid from the eyes of the assembly, and they have done somewhat against any of the commandments of the LORD concerning things which should not be done, and are guilty;

verses.geez:
ወተዐውቀቶሙ ፡ ኀጢአቶሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ አበሱ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ትዕይንቶሙ ፡ ላህመ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ንጹ[ሐ] ፡
                  በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቶሙ ፡ ወያመጽእዎ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ።

translations.lxx: and the sin wherein they have sinned should become known to them, then shall the congregation bring an unblemished calf of the herd for a sin-offering, and they shall bring it to the doors of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: When the sin, which they have sinned against it, is known, then the congregation shall offer a young bullock for the sin, and bring him before the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.geez:
ወይወድዩ ፡ ሊቃነ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ወይጠብሕዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands on the head of the calf before the Lord, and they shall slay the calf before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the elders of the congregation shall lay their hands upon the head of the bullock before the LORD: and the bullock shall be killed before the LORD.

verses.geez: ወያበውእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘቅቡእ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዶሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ።

translations.lxx: And the anointed priest shall bring in of the blood of the calf into the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And the priest that is anointed shall bring of the bullock’s blood to the tabernacle of the congregation:

verses.geez:
ወይጠምዕ ፡ ካህን ፡ አጽባዕቶ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደም ፡ ወይነዝኅ ፡ ስብዕ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቅድመ ፡
                  መንጦላዕተ ፡ ቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall dip his finger into some of the blood of the calf, and shall sprinkle it seven times before the Lord, in front of the veil of the sanctuary.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall dip his finger in some of the blood, and sprinkle it seven times before the LORD, even before the vail.

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደሙ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡
                  ዘመርጡል ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ደሞ ፡ ይክዑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ምንባረ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall put some of the blood on the horns of the altar of the incense of composition, which is before the Lord, which is in the tabernacle of witness; and he shall pour out all the blood at the bottom of the altar of whole-burnt-offerings, which is by the door of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And he shall put some of the blood upon the horns of the altar which is before the LORD, that is in the tabernacle of the congregation, and shall pour out all the blood at the bottom of the altar of the burnt offering, which is at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.geez: ወኵሎ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ ያሴስል ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ወይወድዮ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall take away all the fat from it, and shall offer it up on the altar.
translations.kjv: And he shall take all his fat from him, and burn it upon the altar.

verses.geez:
ወይገብሮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ በከመ ፡ ይገብርዎ ፡ ለላህም ፡ [ዘ]ኀጢአት ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ያገብር ፡ ወያሰተሰሪ ፡ ሎሙ ፡
                  ካህን ፡ ወይትኀደግ ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall do to the calf as he did to the calf of the sin-offering, so shall it be done; and the priest shall make atonement for them, and the trespass shall be forgiven them.
translations.kjv: And he shall do with the bullock as he did with the bullock for a sin offering, so shall he do with this: and the priest shall make an atonement for them, and it shall be forgiven them.

verses.geez:
ወይወስድዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምትዕይንት ፡ ወያውዕይዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ላህም ፡ በከመ ፡ ያውዕዩ ፡ ቀዳሜ ፡
                  ላህም ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall carry forth the calf whole without the camp, and they shall burn the calf as they burnt the former calf: it is the sin-offering of the congregation.
translations.kjv: And he shall carry forth the bullock without the camp, and burn him as he burned the first bullock: it is a sin offering for the congregation.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ መኰንን ፡ አበሰ ፡ ወገብረ ፡ አሐተ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኮሙ ፡ ዘኢይከውን ፡ ለገቢር
                  ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢይፈቅድ ፡ ወነስሐ ፤

translations.lxx: And if a ruler sin, and break one of all the commands of the Lord his God, doing the thing which ought not to be done, unwillingly, and shall sin and trespass,
translations.kjv: When a ruler hath sinned, and done somewhat through ignorance against any of the commandments of the LORD his God concerning things which should not be done, and is guilty;

verses.geez: ወተዐውቀቶ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ እንተ ፡ አበሰ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ወያመጽእ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ሐርጌ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ንጹሐ ።

translations.lxx: and his trespass wherein he has sinned, be known to him,—then shall he offer for his gift a kid of the goats, a male without blemish.
translations.kjv: Or if his sin, wherein he hath sinned, come to his knowledge; he shall bring his offering, a kid of the goats, a male without blemish:

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ሐርጌ ፡ ወይጠብሕዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይጠብሑ ፡ ዘይሠውዑ ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘኀጢአት ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall lay his hand on the head of the kid, and they shall kill it in the place where they kill the victims for whole-burnt-offerings before the Lord; it is a sin-offering.
translations.kjv: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the goat, and kill it in the place where they kill the burnt offering before the LORD: it is a sin offering.

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ በአጽባዕቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ፡
                  ወኵሎ ፡ ደሞ ፡ ይክዑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምንባረ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall put some of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger on the horns of the altar of whole-burnt-offering; and he shall pour out all its blood by the bottom of the altar of whole-burnt-offerings.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt offering, and shall pour out his blood at the bottom of the altar of burnt offering.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ ይወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ በከመ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ሥብሕ ፡ ዘመድኀኒት ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡
                  ወይትኀደግ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall offer up all his fat on the altar, as the fat of the sacrifice of peace-offering; and the priest shall make atonement for him concerning his sin, and it shall be forgiven him.
translations.kjv: And he shall burn all his fat upon the altar, as the fat of the sacrifice of peace offerings: and the priest shall make an atonement for him as concerning his sin, and it shall be forgiven him.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ አበሰት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ኢትፈቅድ ፡ እምሕዝብ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወገብረት ፡ አሐተ ፡
                  እምትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘኢይከውን ፡ ለገቢር ፡ ወነስሐ ፤

translations.lxx: And if a soul of the people of the land should sin unwillingly, in doing a thing contrary to any of the commandments of the Lord, which ought not to be done, and shall transgress,
translations.kjv: And if any one of the common people sin through ignorance, while he doeth somewhat against any of the commandments of the LORD concerning things which ought not to be done, and be guilty;

verses.geez:
ወተዐውቀቶ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ እንተ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ጠሊተ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ አንስተ ፡ ንጽሕተ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡
                  በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ዘገብረ ።

translations.lxx: and his sin should be known to him, wherein he has sinned, then shall he bring a kid of the goats, a female without blemish shall he bring for his sin, which he has sinned.
translations.kjv: Or if his sin, which he hath sinned, come to his knowledge: then he shall bring his offering, a kid of the goats, a female without blemish, for his sin which he hath sinned.

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሳ ፡ ዘአምጽአ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ ወይጠብሕዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ጠሊት ፡ በእንተ ፡
                  ኀጢአት ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይጠብሑ ፡ ዘምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall lay his hand on the head of his sin-offering, and they shall slay the kid of the sin-offering in the place where they slay the victims for whole-burnt-offerings.
translations.kjv: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin offering, and slay the sin offering in the place of the burnt offering.

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደማ ፡ በአጽባዕቱ ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንት ፡ ዘምሥዋዕ ፡ ዘቍርባን ፡ ወኵሎ ፡
                  ደማ ፡ ይክዑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መንበረ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take of its blood with his finger, and shall put it on the horns of the altar of whole-burnt-offerings; and all its blood he shall pour forth by the foot of the altar.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take of the blood thereof with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt offering, and shall pour out all the blood thereof at the bottom of the altar.

verses.geez:
ወይመትር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይመትሩ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ወይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ
                  ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወይትኀደግ ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall take away all the fat, as the fat is taken away from the sacrifice of peace-offering, and the priest shall offer it on the altar for a smell of sweet savour to the Lord; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and his sin shall be forgiven him.
translations.kjv: And he shall take away all the fat thereof, as the fat is taken away from off the sacrifice of peace offerings; and the priest shall burn it upon the altar for a sweet savour unto the LORD; and the priest shall make an atonement for him, and it shall be forgiven him.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ በግዐ ፡ አምጽአ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ አንስተ ፡ ንጽሕተ ፡ ያመጽእ ።

translations.lxx: And if he should offer a lamb for his sin-offering, he shall offer it a female without blemish.
translations.kjv: And if he bring a lamb for a sin offering, he shall bring it a female without blemish.

verses.geez:
ወይወዲ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሳ ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ ወይጠብሕዋ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡
                  ይጠብሑ ፡ ዘይሠውዑ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall lay his hand on the head of the sin-offering, and they shall kill it in the place where they kill the victims for whole-burnt-offerings.
translations.kjv: And he shall lay his hand upon the head of the sin offering, and slay it for a sin offering in the place where they kill the burnt offering.

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ በአጽባዕቱ ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቅርንተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡
                  ዘቍርባን ፡ ወይክዑ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ደሞ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ምንባረ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin-offering with his finger, and shall put it on the horns of the altar of whole-burnt-offerings, and he shall pour out all its blood by the bottom of the altar of whole-burnt-offering.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take of the blood of the sin offering with his finger, and put it upon the horns of the altar of burnt offering, and shall pour out all the blood thereof at the bottom of the altar:

verses.geez:
ወይመትር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይመትሩ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ወይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ እንተ ፡ አበሰ ፡
                  ወይትኀደግ ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall take away all his fat, as the fat of the lamb of the sacrifice of peace-offering is taken away, and the priest shall put it on the altar for a whole-burnt-offering to the Lord; and the priest shall make atonement for him for the sin which he sinned, and it shall be forgiven him.
translations.kjv: And he shall take away all the fat thereof, as the fat of the lamb is taken away from the sacrifice of the peace offerings; and the priest shall burn them upon the altar, according to the offerings made by fire unto the LORD: and the priest shall make an atonement for his sin that he hath committed, and it shall be forgiven him.
